description: A feedlot manager needs to sort a pen of cattle, sending all animals over a certain weight to market.

nodes.task_description: Connect to the smart scale and automated sorting gate system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent establishes a connection with the hardware.

nodes.task_description: Set the sorting parameter to 'weight > 1300 lbs'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly configures the sorting logic.

nodes.task_description: As each animal is weighed, send a command to the gate to either sort it to the 'market' pen or the 'keep' pen.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully controls the sorting gate in real-time for each animal.
